title: Edit first line of text in an automation
excerpt: The ability to edit the first line of text in an automation is needed, if you change column types or the method on how an automation works you dont have the ability to edit the automation and therefore you have to redo t…

posts.author: matt.dowson (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to edit the first line of text in an automation is needed, if you change column types or the method on how an automation works you dont have the ability to edit the automation and therefore you have to redo the automation, in this case i had over 40+ automations with specific notification text unique to each response that had to be re-created because you cant edit the first line…
